raw_consumer_statement:
To : Consumer Financial Protection Bureau ( CFPB ) From : XXXX XXXX Date : XX/XX/XXXX Subject : Complaint Against Citibank Regarding Mishandled Dispute for Fraudulent Charge Dear Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, I am filing a formal complaint against Citibank regarding their mishandling of a fraudulent charge on my credit card. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I charged {$40.00} for a tip to XXXX XXXX for a XXXX treatment. On XX/XX/XXXX, I filed a dispute with Citibank after discovering that the XXXX was XXXX  by an individual fraudulently representing herself as a XXXX  XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. The credentials and name provided were false, and the person performing the XXXX  was not licensed or authorized to administer medical procedures. The XXXX  did not have XXXX and the XXXX  spots were not in the correct placement nor was the correct XXXX  size used. XXXX also did not clean prior to XXXX  or do an exam. None of this was realized until I got home. I suffered from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. I had to go to a medical professional the next day to have actual XXXX XXXX properly because I was going on vacation. I am requesting the money back because I tipped for XXXX and no XXXX was ever XXXX. 

Shortly after XXXX XXXX  my face I filed a complaint with XXXX who immediately refunded my money and kicked her off of the site. XXXXXXXX XXXX business is closed with all one star reviews of fraudulent activity. 

Despite providing Citibank with documentation proving that the service was performed fraudulently, the bank has not resolved the dispute to date. I recently sent a formal letter to Citibank on XX/XX/XXXXXXXX  requesting that they properly investigate and correct the charge. If they fail to resolve this within 15 days, I am escalating the matter to the CFPB. 

Citibanks handling of this matter may violate the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ), which requires creditors to conduct a reasonable investigation when a consumer reports a fraudulent or disputed charge. By failing to properly address the fraudulent nature of this transaction, Citibank has not fulfilled this obligation. 

I am requesting that the CFPB investigate Citibanks actions and require the bank to : 1. Reopen and reinvestigate my dispute properly.

2. Remove the {$40.00} fraudulent charge from my account.

3. Ensure compliance with the Fair Credit Billing Act and related consumer protection laws. 

Attached are copies of my communications with Citibank, the original dispute filing, and supporting evidence verifying that the merchant and XXXX  engaged in fraudulent conduct. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
